title: Anonymous Agent Text Generation Flow
interaction_flow: Client → agent(): agent(instructions, messages, tools) — helper in functions.php
agent() → AnonymousAgent: new AnonymousAgent(instructions, messages, tools) [no schema branch]
agent() → Client: return AnonymousAgent instance (implements Agent, Conversational, HasTools + uses Promptable)
Client → AnonymousAgent: prompt(prompt, attachments?, provider?, model?, timeout?)
AnonymousAgent(Promptable)::prompt → Promptable::withModelFailover(callback, provider, model)
Promptable::withModelFailover → Promptable::getProvidersAndModels(provider, model)
Promptable::getProvidersAndModels → ReflectionClass: reads #[Provider] / #[Model] PHP attributes OR calls provider()/model() methods OR falls back to config('ai.default')
Promptable::getProvidersAndModels → Provider::formatProviderAndModelList(provider, model): returns [providerName => model|null, ...]
Promptable::withModelFailover → Ai::textProviderFor(agent, providerName) [loop per provider for failover]
Ai(facade) → AiManager::textProviderFor(Agent, name?): TextProvider
AiManager::textProviderFor → AiManager::textProvider(name): calls instance(name) via MultipleInstanceManager
AiManager::textProvider → AiManager: validates instance implements TextProvider, throws LogicException if not
AiManager::textProviderFor → AiManager::hasFakeGatewayFor(agent): check if faked
AiManager::textProviderFor → Client: return Provider (or cloned Provider with FakeTextGateway if faked)
Promptable::withModelFailover → Promptable::getDefaultModelFor(provider): if model is null
Promptable::getDefaultModelFor → ReflectionClass: checks #[UseSmartestModel] → provider.smartestTextModel(), #[UseCheapestModel] → provider.cheapestTextModel(), default → provider.defaultTextModel()
Promptable::withModelFailover → Promptable::getTimeout(timeout): resolves timeout from arg / timeout() method / #[Timeout] attribute / default 60s
Promptable::withModelFailover(callback) → Provider::prompt(AgentPrompt): executes callback with resolved (provider, model)
Provider::prompt → [AgentPrompt constructed]: new AgentPrompt(agent, prompt, attachments, provider, model, timeout)
Provider::prompt → Client: return AgentResponse
alt FailoverableException: Promptable::withModelFailover → event(AgentFailedOver(agent, provider, model, e)): fires failover event, continues to next provider
alt all providers exhausted: Promptable::withModelFailover → Client: throw RuntimeException('No AI providers were configured.')
key_relationships: AiManager extends MultipleInstanceManager (Laravel driver manager pattern)
AiManager::textProviderFor returns TextProvider contract instance (one of: AnthropicProvider, OpenAiProvider, GeminiProvider, etc.)
Provider::prompt accepts AgentPrompt and returns AgentResponse
agent() helper returns AnonymousAgent when no $schema Closure provided; StructuredAnonymousAgent otherwise
important_notes: Provider resolution order in getProvidersAndModels: (1) explicit arg, (2) provider() method on agent, (3) #[Provider] attribute, (4) config('ai.default')
Model resolution order: (1) explicit arg, (2) model() method, (3) #[Model] attribute; then if still null → getDefaultModelFor() checks #[UseSmartestModel]/#[UseCheapestModel]/defaultTextModel()
Failover: withModelFailover iterates provider list; on FailoverableException fires AgentFailedOver event and tries next; throws RuntimeException if all exhausted
Fake support: AiManager::textProviderFor swaps in FakeTextGateway on the cloned provider when agent is faked (Ai::fakeAgent())
AnonymousAgent is the ad-hoc/inline variant; named agents extend Agent contract directly and use Promptable trait
Supported built-in drivers: anthropic, azure, cohere, deepseek, eleven (audio), gemini, groq, jina, mistral, ollama, openai, openrouter, voyageai, xai
